authorization/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version property from 1.8 to 11 to align with the new JDK.
Upgrade the Spring Boot parent POM from 1.3.5.RELEASE to 2.3.0.RELEASE to support Java 11 and modern Spring features.
Upgrade the Spring Cloud dependency management version from Brixton.RELEASE to Hoxton.SR4 to match the new Spring Boot version.
Replace the deprecated spring-cloud-starter-oauth2 with spring-security-oauth2-autoconfigure and spring-boot-starter-oauth2-resource-server to align with Spring Security 5.x.
Remove the explicit spring-boot-starter-security dependency as it is now implicitly managed or replaced by the new OAuth2 resource server starter.
Add the Micrometer Prometheus registry dependency to enable Prometheus metrics export.
Add the Spring Cloud Zipkin starter dependency to enable distributed tracing.
Add the Spring Boot configuration processor to generate metadata for externalized configuration.
Exclude the JUnit Vintage engine from the test starter to enforce JUnit 5 usage and remove legacy JUnit 4 support.
Remove the Spring Snapshots and Milestones repositories as the project now uses stable releases.
Change the project group ID from com.example to lol.maki.dev to reflect the actual organization.
Update the project description from a generic demo to a specific Authorization Server description.
Remove the explicit packaging element as jar is the default for Spring Boot applications.
Update the Maven POM schema location URL from http to https.
Reformat the XML indentation from tabs to spaces for consistent code style.
authorization/pom.xml.human_impl: changed indentation from tabs to 4 spaces

.gitignore.general_idea: Add standard Maven build output and wrapper exclusions to .gitignore.
Add Spring Tool Suite specific IDE artifact exclusions.
Expand IntelliJ IDEA exclusions to cover workspace and project files.
Add NetBeans specific project and build artifact exclusions.
Add VS Code workspace configuration exclusions.

README.md.general_idea: Replaced the project description and architecture overview with concrete curl commands for API testing.
README.md.human_impl: Removed markdown text describing Authorization/Resource/UI components and replaced with a code block containing curl commands for OAuth2 token retrieval and CRUD operations.

authorization/.mvn/wrapper/maven-wrapper.general_idea: Update the Maven distribution URL to use the new repo.maven.apache.org domain and version 3.6.3.
Add the wrapperUrl property to specify the Maven Wrapper JAR version.

authorization/mvnw.general_idea: Update the Apache License URL from HTTP to HTTPS for security compliance.
Replace legacy backtick command substitution with modern $() syntax and fix spacing in conditionals.
Simplify Java Home detection on macOS by removing deprecated Apple JDK paths and relying on /usr/libexec/java_home.
Improve path resolution for MinGW environments using subshells for robustness.
Refactor find_maven_basedir to accept an argument and add Solaris 10 workaround.
Add logic to automatically download the maven-wrapper.jar if it is missing, supporting wget, curl, or Java fallback.
Move Cygwin path conversion to after wrapper download and include MAVEN_PROJECTBASEDIR in conversion.
authorization/mvnw.human_impl: Moved cygpath blocks and added MAVEN_PROJECTBASEDIR=$(cygpath --path --windows "$MAVEN_PROJECTBASEDIR")

authorization/mvnw.general_idea: Update the final exec command to pass MAVEN_CONFIG explicitly.

authorization/mvnw.cmd.general_idea: Update the Apache License URL from HTTP to HTTPS for security compliance.
Modernize the script header comment to remove the outdated 'Maven2' reference.
authorization/mvnw.cmd.human_impl: Maven2 Start Up Batch script -> Maven Start Up Batch script

authorization/mvnw.cmd.general_idea: Correct a minor typo in the environment variable description comment.
Set the command window title to the script name for better user experience.
Correct a grammatical error in the echo configuration comment.
authorization/mvnw.cmd.human_impl: enable echoing my setting -> enable echoing by setting

authorization/mvnw.cmd.general_idea: Remove the initialization of MAVEN_CMD_LINE_ARGS from the init block as it is moved later.
Fix the wrapper JAR path to be relative to the project base directory instead of the current working directory.
Add logic to automatically download the Maven Wrapper JAR if it is missing, enabling usage without checked-in binaries.
authorization/mvnw.cmd.human_impl: Added block checking existence of WRAPPER_JAR and using powershell to download from DOWNLOAD_URL

authorization/mvnw.cmd.general_idea: Move the definition of MAVEN_CMD_LINE_ARGS to ensure it is set before execution and standardized across platforms.
authorization/mvnw.cmd.human_impl: set MAVEN_CMD_LINE_ARGS=%* moved to end of script

authorization/mvnw.cmd.general_idea: Update the Java launch command to use the new variable structure and pass arguments correctly.
authorization/mvnw.cmd.human_impl: Changed launch command to use %MAVEN_CONFIG% and %* instead of %MAVEN_CMD_LINE_ARGS%

authorization/mvnw.cmd.general_idea: Ensure the file ends with a newline character for POSIX compliance.
authorization/mvnw.cmd.human_impl: Added newline at end of file

authorization/src/main/resources/templat.general_idea: Removed the Thymeleaf XML namespace declaration from the HTML root element.
Added standard viewport and compatibility meta tags for better mobile rendering.
Changed the page title from a specific demo description to a generic index title.
Replaced the UIkit CSS framework with PUI (Patternfly UI) components.
authorization/src/main/resources/templat.human_impl: Replaced UIkit CDN link with 'pui-components-19.2.4.css' CDN link.

authorization/src/main/resources/templat.general_idea: Replaced the UIkit grid-based layout with a simpler structure using inline padding and PUI classes.
authorization/src/main/resources/templat.human_impl: Removed 'uk-grid' divs and added 'style="padding: 30px;"' to body.

authorization/src/main/resources/templat.general_idea: Added a welcome message displaying the logged-in user's full name.
Updated the logout form to use PUI button styling and Thymeleaf data attributes.
authorization/src/main/resources/templat.human_impl: Changed form action to 'data-th-action' and button class to 'pui-btn pui-btn--primary'.

authorization/src/main/resources/templat.general_idea: Added a table to display detailed user account information (family name, given name, email).
authorization/src/main/resources/templat.human_impl: Added a '<table class="pui-table ...">' with rows for 'account.familyName', 'account.givenName', and 'account.email'.

authorization/src/main/resources/templat.general_idea: Migrate the login page styling from UIkit 2 to PUI (Pivotal UI) components.
authorization/src/main/resources/templat.human_impl: Replaced UIkit CDN link with PUI CSS and updated HTML structure to use PUI grid and form classes.

authorization/src/main/resources/templat.general_idea: Change login credentials from username/password to email/password.
authorization/src/main/resources/templat.human_impl: Renamed input name 'username' to 'email' and type to 'email'.

authorization/src/main/resources/templat.general_idea: Add standard HTML5 meta tags for viewport and compatibility.
authorization/src/main/resources/templat.human_impl: Added viewport and X-UA-Compatible meta tags in head.

authorization/src/main/resources/templat.general_idea: Remove Thymeleaf-based error and logout feedback messages from the login form.
authorization/src/main/resources/templat.human_impl: Deleted paragraphs with th:if conditions for param.error and param.logout.
